introduction: Several old mining carts sit on rusty tracks, filled with coal, rock debris, and ore samples from the last day of operations.
As you sift through the contents, something catches your eye beneath the coal dust...
A silver ring! It must have been dropped during the hasty evacuation. The delicate craftsmanship suggests it belonged to someone from town.
Wait—Meredith mentioned losing her grandmother's ring when she worked here briefly. This must be it!

options.text: [Take the ring and search the carts]
